items.titleZh: 血清和尿液半乳糖凝集素-3与狼疮性肾炎患者肾纤维化的关联：一项横断面对照研究
items.abstractZh: 目的：探讨狼疮性肾炎（LN）患者血清半乳糖凝集素-3（sGal-3）和尿液半乳糖凝集素-3（uGal-3）水平与肾纤维化（RF）严重程度的相关性，并评估其识别中重度间质纤维化和肾小管萎缩（IFTA）的诊断性能。方法：本横断面对照研究纳入150名参与者：50名LN患者、50名诊断为系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）但无LN的患者，以及50名健康对照。采用ELISA法测量sGal-3和uGal-3水平。组织病理学评估包括IFTA严重程度分级。LN患者被分为轻度IFTA（<26%）和中重度IFTA（≥26%）。此外，我们进行了相关性分析、ROC曲线分析和多变量逻辑回归分析。结果：LN患者的sGal-3和uGal-3水平显著高于其他组（p < 0.001）。两种生物标志物均与IFTA百分比呈强正相关（sGal-3：rho = 0.76；uGal-3：rho = 0.81；p < 0.001）。与轻度IFTA患者相比，中重度IFTA患者的sGal-3和uGal-3水平显著升高（p < 0.001）。ROC分析显示，uGal-3对中重度IFTA的区分能力（AUC = 0.903）高于sGal-3（AUC = 0.801）。在多变量逻辑回归中，在校正肾功能参数后，sGal-3和uGal-3水平均与中重度IFTA独立相关。结论：sGal-3和uGal-3水平均与LN的RF严重程度显著相关。uGal-3对中重度IFTA具有更优的诊断性能，可能成为LN中一种有前景的无创RF生物标志物。需要在大型前瞻性研究中验证。

items.title: Exosome-mediated immune modulation in rheumatoid arthritis and its role in synovial inflammation and autoimmune amplification.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is a chronic autoimmune disease characterized by persistent articular inflammation, cartilage destruction and aberrant synovial angiogenesis. While current cytokine-centric therapies have revolutionized RA management, their limitations highlight the need for a deeper understanding of the integrated synovial microenvironment. This review explores the critical role of exosomes as central regulatory nodes orchestrating intercellular communication within the RA joint. Under conditions of hypoxia and metabolic stress, exosomes secreted by fibroblast-like synoviocytes (FLS) and immune cells are dynamically loaded with pathogenic cargo, including microRNAs and autoantigens. These vesicles actively modulate macrophage phenotypes, moving beyond the traditional binary framework to reflect a continuum of pro-inflammatory activation, reprogram T-cells to favour pathogenic Th17 expansion while impairing regulatory T-cells (Tregs), and amplify autoreactive B-cell activation for sustained autoantibody production. While exosomes sustain the hypoxia-inflammation-angiogenesis axis and promote invasive pannus formation independently of transient soluble cytokines, we critically delineate which of these mechanisms are validated in RA-specific models against broader immunobiology. We propose that targeting these exosome-mediated signalling cascades offers a promising strategy to overcome therapeutic resistance, signifying their potential as novel therapeutic interventions and high-fidelity diagnostic biomarkers. Further, the significant translational, delivery, and standardization challenges are also addressed.

items.title: Association of an app-based intervention with improvements in mobility, trunk muscle strength and patient-reported disease activity in axial spondyloarthritis: a 24-week pre-post study.
items.abstract: In a nationwide randomised controlled trial among 200 axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA) patients, the medical app Axia improved patient-reported disease activity scores, functional status and quality of life. This companion study aimed to explore Axia's effects on objective parameters such as mobility, strength and imaging. Single-centre, two-phase pre-post intervention study over 24 weeks. Thirty-two patients with axSpA on stable pharmacotherapy underwent 12 weeks of standard care (phase I) followed by 12 weeks of Axia use (phase II). The primary endpoint was Bath Ankylosing Spondylitis Metrology Index (BASMI) at week 24 (W24) versus week 12 (W12) and baseline. Secondary endpoints included muscle strength, Bath Ankylosing Spondylitis Disease Activity Index (BASDAI), safety and magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of the sacroiliac joints. Twenty-seven (84%) of 32 participants (mean age 49.1 years, 48.1% females and radiographic axSpA, 66.7% biological or targeted synthetic disease-modifying anti-rheumatic drugs therapy) completed the study. During standard care, BASMI (baseline 3.1; W12 3.0; p  > 0.05) and BASDAI (baseline 4.7; W12 4.9; p  > 0.05) remained unchanged, while median spinal extensor strength declined by 14%. During Axia use, BASMI improved to 2.4 ( p  < 0.001), BASDAI to 3.7 ( p  < 0.001) and muscle strength increased by 25% ( p  < 0.01). BASMI improvement was greater in patients with baseline MRI inflammation. MRI showed no increase or decrease in bone marrow oedema or structural damage. No app-related adverse events occurred. Axia use was associated with improved spinal mobility, extensor strength and disease activity, without relevant safety concerns. The study was registered in the German Clinical Trials Register (DRKS00038067).

items.titleZh: 基于应用程序的干预与中轴型脊柱关节炎患者活动能力、躯干肌力量和患者报告疾病活动度改善的关联：一项24周前后对照研究
items.abstractZh: 在一项针对200名中轴型脊柱关节炎（axSpA）患者的全国性随机对照试验中，医疗应用程序Axia改善了患者报告的疾病活动度评分、功能状态和生活质量。本伴随研究旨在探索Axia对客观参数（如活动能力、力量和影像学）的影响。单中心、两阶段前后对照干预研究，为期24周。32名接受稳定药物治疗的axSpA患者先接受12周标准护理（阶段I），随后接受12周Axia使用（阶段II）。主要终点是第24周（W24）与第12周（W12）及基线时的Bath强直性脊柱炎测量指数（BASMI）。次要终点包括肌力、Bath强直性脊柱炎疾病活动指数（BASDAI）、安全性和骶髂关节磁共振成像（MRI）。32名参与者中27名（84%）完成了研究（平均年龄49.1岁，48.1%为女性，放射学axSpA，66.7%接受生物制剂或靶向合成疾病修饰抗风湿药物治疗）。在标准护理期间，BASMI（基线3.1；W12 3.0；p > 0.05）和BASDAI（基线4.7；W12 4.9；p > 0.05）保持不变，而脊柱伸肌力量中位数下降14%。在Axia使用期间，BASMI改善至2.4（p < 0.001），BASDAI改善至3.7（p < 0.001），肌力增加25%（p < 0.01）。基线MRI有炎症的患者BASMI改善更大。MRI显示骨髓水肿或结构性损伤无增加或减少。未发生与应用程序相关的不良事件。Axia的使用与脊柱活动度、伸肌力量和疾病活动度的改善相关，且无相关安全性问题。该研究在德国临床试验注册中心注册（DRKS00038067）。

items.title: Identification of Diagnostic Biomarkers Related to Oxidative Stress in Rheumatoid Arthritis.
items.abstract: This study aimed to identify oxidative stress-related genes as potential diagnostic biomarkers for rheumatoid arthritis (RA). We first obtained RA transcriptomic data from the Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO) database and calculated oxidative stress scores using single-sample gene set enrichment analysis (ssGSEA). Differentially expressed genes (DEGs) were identified by limma (R). Gene Ontology (GO) enrichment was performed using the clusterProfiler package, and weighted gene co-expression network analysis (WGCNA) was used to classify oxidative stress modules. Candidate biomarker genes for RA were screened by support vector machine-recursive feature elimination (SVM-RFE), least absolute shrinkage and selection operator (LASSO), random forest, and eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost). We then constructed a logistic regression-based diagnostic model. Immune infiltration analysis, pathway enrichment analysis, single-cell RNA sequencing, and in vitro experiments were employed to comprehensively elucidate the expression profiles and potential mechanisms of action of the identified genes in rheumatoid arthritis (RA). RA samples had higher oxidative stress scores than normal samples. WGCNA showed that the cyan module was linked to oxidative stress, from which 88 potential genes were screened. Five signature genes (CARS2, VCP, FCGR2A, ITGB2, SETD2) were selected. RT-qPCR showed higher expression of the five genes in MH7A than in HFLS cells. The logistic model developed based on these genes demonstrated robust performance, with an area under the curve (AUC) greater than 0.9 in both training and validation sets. The model was positively associated with ImmuneScore and the infiltration of specific immune cells. Notably, the model genes showed distinct expression patterns in plasmacytoid dendritic cells (pDCs) and monocytes. The five oxidative stress-related genes identified in this study exhibited elevated expression in RA. Immune infiltration and pathway enrichment analysis revealed their potential contribution to immune dysregulation via IL6-JAK-STAT3, ROS, and hypoxia pathways in RA. This study established a five-oxidative-stress-gene diagnostic model, offering a potential molecular tool for early RA detection and immune-based patient stratification.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎中与氧化应激相关的诊断生物标志物的鉴定
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在鉴定与氧化应激相关的基因作为类风湿关节炎（RA）的潜在诊断生物标志物。我们首先从基因表达综合（GEO）数据库获取RA转录组数据，并使用单样本基因集富集分析（ssGSEA）计算氧化应激评分。通过limma（R）鉴定差异表达基因（DEG）。使用clusterProfiler包进行基因本体（GO）富集分析，并采用加权基因共表达网络分析（WGCNA）对氧化应激模块进行分类。通过支持向量机-递归特征消除（SVM-RFE）、最小绝对收缩和选择算子（LASSO）、随机森林和极端梯度提升（XGBoost）筛选RA的候选生物标志物基因。随后构建基于逻辑回归的诊断模型。采用免疫浸润分析、通路富集分析、单细胞RNA测序和体外实验，全面阐明所鉴定基因在类风湿关节炎（RA）中的表达谱和潜在作用机制。RA样本的氧化应激评分高于正常样本。WGCNA显示青色模块与氧化应激相关，从中筛选出88个潜在基因。选择了五个特征基因（CARS2、VCP、FCGR2A、ITGB2、SETD2）。RT-qPCR显示MH7A细胞中这五个基因的表达高于HFLS细胞。基于这些基因构建的逻辑模型表现出稳健性能，在训练集和验证集中曲线下面积（AUC）均大于0.9。该模型与免疫评分及特定免疫细胞的浸润呈正相关。值得注意的是，模型基因在浆细胞样树突状细胞（pDC）和单核细胞中显示出不同的表达模式。本研究中鉴定的五个氧化应激相关基因在RA中表达升高。免疫浸润和通路富集分析揭示了它们可能通过IL6-JAK-STAT3、ROS和缺氧通路在RA免疫失调中发挥作用。本研究建立了一个五氧化应激基因诊断模型，为RA早期检测和基于免疫的患者分层提供了潜在的分子工具。

items.title: Exploring Information Needs and Perspectives on a Patient Decision Aid for Biologic Therapy: A Qualitative Interview Study Among Individuals with Rheumatoid Arthritis.
items.abstract: Significant advances in therapeutic and management options have been made for rheumatoid arthritis (RA), including the development of biologics. However, some patients have expressed hesitancy with respect to their use. We aimed to (1) investigate RA patient perspectives on a biologic patient decision aid; and (2) explore how this decision aid addressed their broader information needs in a US healthcare context. We conducted in-depth telephone interviews with RA patients who were considering either initiating a biologic for the first time or switching to another biologic. Participants were recruited from across the US by a research coordinator based at Massachusetts General Hospital. Participants were first invited to access an existing decision aid developed to support individuals with RA who are considering a biologic. We conducted an iterative content analysis guided by the grounded theory approach. We interviewed 14 patients with RA, among whom five were biologic-naive. We identified four major themes: 1) treatment-related information seeking behavior (including connecting with others with a chronic disease); 2) helpful aspects of the decision aid (including access to patient stories); 3) decision aid limitations and potential solutions (including content preferences and accessibility); and 4) impacts on the decision to initiate a biologic (including empowerment to engage in shared decision-making). These four themes highlight key factors to consider for the design/refinement and implementation of patient decision aids in the US (including key information needs and the utility of patient stories) to appropriately meet the needs of patients who are considering a biologic.

items.title: Muscle relaxant use and the associated risk of Sjögren's syndrome and dry eye disease (including keratoconjunctivitis sicca) in patients with ankylosing spondylitis: a population-based cohort study.
items.abstract: Muscle relaxants are widely used for the treatment of ankylosing spondylitis (AS) and inevitably have many adverse reactions. Individuals with AS frequently present with ocular symptoms. However, the association of muscle relaxants with the increase of dry eye or Sjogren's syndrome (SS) in AS patients remains unclear. To investigate the association between muscle relaxant use and the risks of Sjögren's syndrome and dry eye disease (including keratoconjunctivitis sicca) in patients with AS. A population-based retrospective cohort study. This population-based retrospective cohort study identified patients suffering from AS between 2007 and 2017 ( N  = 26,806,963) in the National Health Insurance Research Database (NHIRD) of Taiwan. The demographic data of two study groups, namely muscle relaxant users and non-users, were collected in the present study. The inverse probability of treatment weighting (IPTW) was used to balance the clinical confounders. Furthermore, we used Kaplan-Meier analyses and Cox proportional hazard regression to analyze the association between cumulative muscle relaxant use and SS or dry eye risk in AS patients. After exclusion, 68,970 muscle relaxant users and 31,863 non-users were included in our study. The risks of composite outcome (hazard ratios (HR) 1.37 (1.31-1.43), aHR1.18 (1.13-1.24), and IPTW HR 1.17 (1.13-1.22)), Sjogren's syndrome (HR 1.63 (1.47-1.79), aHR 1.44 (1.30-1.59), and IPTW HR 1.45 (1.32-1.59)), Dry eye disease (including keratoconjunctivitis sicca) (HR 1.32 (1.26-1.39), aHR 1.12 (1.06-1.17), and IPTW HR 1.11 (1.06-1.16)) were all significantly higher among muscle relaxant users ( p  < 0.0001). Moreover, higher doses of muscle relaxant use increased higher risks of composite outcome (25< medication possession ratio (MPR), aHR = 1.77 (1.60-1.96)) and dry eye disease (25< MPR, aHR = 1.74 (1.56-1.94)) ( p  < 0.0001 for trend). However, there was higher risk of Sjogren's syndrome among the patients who received 5< MPR ⩽10 (aHR = 1.70 (1.49-1.93)). Muscle relaxant users who received ethers chemically related to antihistamines and oral muscle relaxant users had higher risks of composite outcome, Sjogren's syndrome, and dry eye disease. This study demonstrates that cumulative muscle relaxant exposure might increase the risk of dry eye or even SS at a dose-dependent manner. Muscle relaxant use and dry eye risk in patients with ankylosing spondylitis What was studied? This research looked at whether commonly used muscle relaxant medications could increase the risk of developing dry eye disease or Sjogren’s syndrome (an autoimmune condition that causes severe dryness, often of the eyes and mouth) in people with Ankylosing Spondylitis (AS). Since both AS and these medications can involve eye issues, the researchers wanted to see if there was a link. How was it studied? The study used health records from a large national database in Taiwan (2007-2017), including over 26 million people. From this, the researchers identified two groups of AS patients: those who used muscle relaxants (68,970 people) and those who did not (31,863 people). They used statistical methods to carefully compare these groups, accounting for other differences in patient health. What were the main findings? AS patients who used muscle relaxants had a higher risk of being diagnosed with either dry eye disease or Sjogren’s syndrome compared to non-users. The risk of Sjogren’s syndrome was notably higher (about 45-63% higher) for muscle relaxant users. The risk of dry eye disease was also significantly higher (about 11-37% higher) for users. Higher doses of muscle relaxants were linked to a greater risk of dry eye disease. The risk of Sjogren’s syndrome was also highest at certain dose levels. Specific types of muscle relaxants, particularly certain “Ethers” and oral medications, were associated with increased risk. What is the conclusion? The study suggests that using muscle relaxants, especially at higher doses or over long periods, may increase the risk of developing dry eye disease or Sjogren’s syndrome in patients with Ankylosing Spondylitis. Patients on these medications should be aware of potential eye-related symptoms.

items.titleZh: 肌肉松弛剂使用与强直性脊柱炎患者干燥综合征和干眼病（包括干燥性角结膜炎）的关联风险：一项基于人群的队列研究
items.abstractZh: 肌肉松弛剂广泛用于治疗强直性脊柱炎（AS），且不可避免地有许多不良反应。AS患者常出现眼部症状。然而，肌肉松弛剂与AS患者干眼或干燥综合征（SS）增加之间的关联仍不清楚。本研究旨在探讨肌肉松弛剂使用与AS患者干燥综合征和干眼病（包括干燥性角结膜炎）风险之间的关联。一项基于人群的回顾性队列研究。本基于人群的回顾性队列研究从台湾全民健康保险研究数据库（NHIRD）中识别了2007年至2017年间患有AS的患者（N = 26,806,963）。本研究收集了两个研究组（即肌肉松弛剂使用者和非使用者）的人口统计学数据。使用治疗加权逆概率（IPTW）来平衡临床混杂因素。此外，我们使用Kaplan-Meier分析和Cox比例风险回归分析肌肉松弛剂累积使用与AS患者SS或干眼风险之间的关联。排除后，本研究纳入了68,970名肌肉松弛剂使用者和31,863名非使用者。复合结局的风险（风险比（HR）1.37（1.31-1.43），aHR 1.18（1.13-1.24），IPTW HR 1.17（1.13-1.22））、干燥综合征（HR 1.63（1.47-1.79），aHR 1.44（1.30-1.59），IPTW HR 1.45（1.32-1.59））、干眼病（包括干燥性角结膜炎）（HR 1.32（1.26-1.39），aHR 1.12（1.06-1.17），IPTW HR 1.11（1.06-1.16））在肌肉松弛剂使用者中均显著更高（p < 0.0001）。此外，较高剂量的肌肉松弛剂使用增加了复合结局（25< 药物持有率（MPR），aHR = 1.77（1.60-1.96））和干眼病（25< MPR，aHR = 1.74（1.56-1.94））的更高风险（趋势p < 0.0001）。然而，接受5< MPR ≤10的患者发生干燥综合征的风险更高（aHR = 1.70（1.49-1.93））。使用与抗组胺药化学相关的醚类肌肉松弛剂和口服肌肉松弛剂的使用者发生复合结局、干燥综合征和干眼病的风险更高。本研究表明，累积肌肉松弛剂暴露可能以剂量依赖性方式增加干眼甚至SS的风险。肌肉松弛剂使用与强直性脊柱炎患者干眼风险：研究了什么？这项研究探讨了常用的肌肉松弛剂药物是否会增加强直性脊柱炎（AS）患者发生干眼病或干燥综合征（一种导致严重干燥（通常为眼和口）的自身免疫性疾病）的风险。由于AS和这些药物都可能涉及眼部问题，研究人员希望了解是否存在关联。如何研究的？该研究使用了台湾一个大型国家数据库（2007-2017年）的健康记录，包括超过2600万人。从中，研究人员确定了AS患者的两组：使用肌肉松弛剂者（68,970人）和未使用者（31,863人）。他们使用统计方法仔细比较这些组，并考虑了患者健康方面的其他差异。主要发现是什么？使用肌肉松弛剂的AS患者被诊断为干眼病或干燥综合征的风险高于未使用者。肌肉松弛剂使用者发生干燥综合征的风险显著更高（约高45-63%）。使用者发生干眼病的风险也显著更高（约高11-37%）。较高剂量的肌肉松弛剂与干眼病风险增加相关。干燥综合征的风险在某些剂量水平也最高。特定类型的肌肉松弛剂，特别是某些“醚类”和口服药物，与风险增加相关。结论是什么？该研究表明，使用肌肉松弛剂，尤其是在较高剂量或长期使用时，可能会增加强直性脊柱炎患者发生干眼病或干燥综合征的风险。使用这些药物的患者应注意潜在的眼部相关症状。

items.title: Precision imaging biomarkers for gout: artifact-specific spectral CT parameters for personalized differentiation of tophi in a prospective study.
items.abstract: Spectral computed tomography (CT) enables non-invasive visualization and quantification of monosodium urate deposits and has an important role in gout diagnosis and monitoring. However, artifact-related false-positive findings may reduce diagnostic confidence, particularly when artifacts show attenuation features overlapping with tophi. To evaluate advanced spectral CT parameters as quantitative imaging biomarkers for differentiating tophi from common artifacts. Prospective cross-sectional study. Consecutive participants with suspected foot gout were prospectively recruited from May 2023 to May 2024 and underwent foot spectral CT scans. Participants were classified into gout and non-gout groups. Regions of interest (ROIs) were delineated on index tophi in the gout group and on artifact regions in the non-gout group, including nail bed, skin, beam-hardening, vascular, and tendon artifacts. Conventional attenuation (HU 120-kV ) and three advanced spectral parameters (effective atomic number (Zeff), electron density (ED), and dual-energy ratio (DER)) were measured and compared. Diagnostic performance of each parameter was assessed using receiver operating characteristic curves and the area under the curve (AUC). The final analysis included 82 tophus ROIs and 243 artifact ROIs. Tophi differed significantly from beam-hardening, vascular, and tendon artifacts across all parameters ( p  < 0.001). ED (AUC = 0.848-0.939) and HU 120-kV (AUC = 0.819-0.935) showed the most consistent performance for overall artifacts, beam-hardening, vascular, and tendon artifacts, with no significant difference between them. In contrast, discrimination of nail bed and skin artifacts was more limited. DER (AUC = 0.728) and Zeff (AUC = 0.722) provided complementary values for nail bed artifacts, while ED showed the highest AUC for skin artifacts (AUC = 0.740). Spectral CT parameters may support artifact-specific tophus differentiation in gout. An artifact-specific parameter selection approach may help reduce false-positive interpretations and improve confidence in spectral CT-based gout assessment. Chinese Clinical Trial Registry, ChiCTR2300069114, https://www.chictr.org.cn/showproj.html?proj=185804. Using advanced CT imaging to better tell gout deposits apart from false signals and improve diagnosis Why was the study done? Gout is a common condition caused by the build-up of uric acid crystals in joints. Spectral CT is a special type of CT scan that can help show these deposits because different materials leave different “signals” on the image. In this way, doctors can not only see suspected gout deposits but also estimate how much crystal material is present. However, some normal tissues or image effects can produce false color signals that look like gout deposits. If these false signals are mistaken for true deposits, doctors may overestimate the amount of gout or feel less confident when reading the scan. Therefore, it is important to find better ways to tell true gout deposits from false signals. What did the researchers do? We prospectively recruited participants with suspected gout in the foot. All participants underwent spectral CT scans. We compared real gout deposits with several common types of false signals found in spectral CT images. For each case, we measured both standard CT values and additional advanced imaging features that describe the physical properties of tissues. We then tested how well these measurements could distinguish true gout deposits from false signals. What did the researchers find? We analyzed 147 scans, including both gout deposits and different types of false signals. We found that some advanced measurements, especially one called “electron density”, were better at distinguishing real gout deposits from false signals than standard CT values alone. However, the best method varied depending on the type of false signal. Some types, such as skin-related signals, remained difficult to distinguish. What do the findings mean? This study suggested that different spectral CT measurements may be useful for different types of false signals. Instead of relying on a single CT value, using an artifact-specific approach may help reduce false-positive interpretations and improve confidence in spectral CT-based gout assessment.

items.title: Rising overweight and obesity in Swiss psoriatic arthritis patients, 2007-2022: a nationwide registry-population comparison.
items.abstract: To compare overweight and obesity prevalence in Swiss patients with psoriatic arthritis (PsA) against the general Swiss population from 2007-2022, evaluate temporal trends, and assess socioeconomic correlates (age, sex, education). We performed a repeated cross-sectional analysis of adults with PsA in the Swiss Clinical Quality Management in Rheumatic Diseases (SCQM) registry who had BMI recorded in 2007, 2012, 2017, or 2022 (patients could contribute to more than one index year). Age-, sex-, and education-stratified BMI distributions were compared with Swiss Health Survey data using χ² goodness-of-fit tests. Within PsA, clinical and socioeconomic variables were compared across BMI categories using Fisher's exact or Kruskal-Wallis tests; pairwise changes over time were assessed with one-sided Wilcoxon rank-sum tests. Among 1,150 PsA patients in 2022, 37.6% were overweight and 28.2% obese, versus 30.9% and 12.1% in the Swiss population. In cross-sectional comparisons, obesity was associated with more frequent elevated C-reactive protein (55.8% vs. 37.0%), higher patient global assessment (mean [SD] 3.2 [2.4] vs. 2.8 [2.2]) and physician global assessment (2.5 [2.0] vs. 2.1 [1.8]), and lower EQ-5D-3L health state (0.7 [0.2] vs. 0.8 [0.2]). Obesity prevalence rose from 19.4% in 2007 to 28.2% in 2022, a trend driven by men. Obesity prevalence varied across educational strata but did not follow a monotonic social gradient; within each stratum obesity was markedly more common in PsA than in the Swiss general population. Overweight and obesity affect nearly two-thirds of Swiss PsA patients and have increased since 2007. Cross-sectional associations between obesity, higher inflammatory burden and poorer patient-reported health state, together with the widening gap versus the general population, support integrating structured, multidisciplinary weight-management programmes into PsA treat-to-target care, particularly for men.

items.titleZh: 2007-2022年瑞士银屑病关节炎患者超重和肥胖率上升：一项全国性注册人群比较
items.abstractZh: 比较2007-2022年瑞士银屑病关节炎（PsA）患者与普通人群的超重和肥胖患病率，评估时间趋势，并分析社会经济学相关因素（年龄、性别、教育程度）。我们对瑞士风湿病临床质量管理（SCQM）登记系统中在2007、2012、2017或2022年有BMI记录的成人PsA患者进行了重复横断面分析（患者可贡献多个指数年）。使用χ²拟合优度检验，将按年龄、性别和教育程度分层的BMI分布与瑞士健康调查数据进行比较。在PsA患者中，使用Fisher精确检验或Kruskal-Wallis检验比较不同BMI类别间的临床和社会经济学变量；使用单侧Wilcoxon秩和检验评估成对时间变化。在2022年的1,150名PsA患者中，37.6%超重，28.2%肥胖，而瑞士普通人群分别为30.9%和12.1%。在横断面比较中，肥胖与C反应蛋白升高更频繁（55.8% vs. 37.0%）、患者整体评估更高（均值[SD] 3.2 [2.4] vs. 2.8 [2.2]）、医生整体评估更高（2.5 [2.0] vs. 2.1 [1.8]）以及EQ-5D-3L健康状态更低（0.7 [0.2] vs. 0.8 [0.2]）相关。肥胖患病率从2007年的19.4%上升至2022年的28.2%，这一趋势主要由男性驱动。肥胖患病率在不同教育阶层间存在差异，但未呈现单调的社会梯度；在每个阶层内，PsA患者的肥胖率均显著高于瑞士普通人群。超重和肥胖影响了近三分之二的瑞士PsA患者，且自2007年以来有所增加。肥胖与更高的炎症负担和更差的患者报告健康状态之间的横断面关联，以及其与普通人群之间不断扩大的差距，支持将结构化、多学科体重管理计划纳入PsA达标治疗，尤其是针对男性。

items.title: Serum interleukin-2 levels associate with disease activity and cardiovascular risk in patients with rheumatoid arthritis.
items.abstract: Interleukin-2 (IL-2) plays anti-inflammatory and immunoregulatory roles and has been implicated in the pathogenesis of rheumatoid arthritis (RA). However, the relationship between its circulating serum levels and specific clinical features of the disease remains unclear. In this study, we aimed to investigate the association between serum IL-2 concentrations and a wide range of RA-related characteristics, including cardiovascular comorbidities. 216 RA patients underwent assessments of disease characteristics and activity indices. Lipid profile was obtained, insulin resistance indices were calculated, and metabolic syndrome criteria were applied. Carotid ultrasound examinations were performed to assess arterial stiffness, intima-media thickness, and the presence of carotid plaques. Cardiovascular risk was estimated using the SCORE2 tool. Serum IL-2 levels were measured using the Simoa (Single Molecule Array) technique. Finally, a multivariable linear regression analysis was conducted to explore the associations between disease characteristics and IL-2 levels. After multivariable adjustment, IL-2 was independently and positively associated with disease activity. Patients positive for rheumatoid factor and anti-citrullinated protein antibodies also exhibited significantly higher IL-2 levels than seronegative individuals. Furthermore, IL-2 showed a positive relationship with pancreatic beta-cell function. Notably, circulating IL-2 concentrations were significantly associated with increased cardiovascular risk as estimated by the SCORE2 algorithm. Circulating IL-2 levels are independently and positively associated with both disease activity and cardiovascular risk in patients with RA. These findings further emphasise the pivotal role of IL-2 in the pathophysiology of RA and its associated cardiovascular comorbidities, highlighting IL-2 as a potential biomarker and therapeutic target in this population.

items.title: Stratification of primary antiphospholipid syndrome by mechanistic immunophenotype: machine learning identifies distinct T-cell and T-bet+CD11c+ B cell-driven patient clusters.
items.abstract: Primary antiphospholipid syndrome (pAPS) is a clinically heterogeneous disorder. This study aimed to investigate the distribution of immune cell subsets, with a focus on T-bet+CD11c+ B cells, in patients with pAPS. Furthermore, it aimed to utilise machine learning-based clustering to resolve the clinical heterogeneity of pAPS by identifying distinct immunophenotypes and exploring their associations with specific manifestations. This study involved 54 patients with pAPS, 26 healthy controls (HC), and 16 healthy pregnant (HP) controls. The distribution of 16 T and B cell subsets was analysed using flow cytometry. K-means clustering was applied to stratify patients based on their immune profiles. Our results indicated a significant increase in the T-bet+CD11c+ B cell population in pAPS patients compared to HCs (median 3.8% vs. 2.4%, p<0.01). More importantly, exploratory machine learning-based clustering resolved the clinical heterogeneity of thrombosis by identifying three distinct immunophenotypes. Notably, Cluster K2 (n=17), characterised by the highest T-bet+CD11c+ B cell levels, was associated with venous thrombosis (41.2%). In contrast, Cluster K1 (n=19), which featured a different immune profile, was associated with the highest rate of arterial thrombosis (31.6%). A positive correlation was also found between T-bet+CD11c+ B cell levels and pathogenic anti-β2GP1 IgG titres in patients with thrombotic events. Our findings suggest that pAPS is not a monolithic disorder but a heterogeneous syndrome composed of distinct, mechanistically-defined immunophenotypes. Our stratification framework links T-cell-driven and T-bet+CD11c+ B cell-driven pathways to different clinical outcomes and provides novel mechanistic insights into obstetric APS.

items.titleZh: 通过机制性免疫表型对原发性抗磷脂综合征进行分层：机器学习识别出不同的T细胞和T-bet+CD11c+ B细胞驱动的患者集群。
items.abstractZh: 原发性抗磷脂综合征（pAPS）是一种临床异质性疾病。本研究旨在调查pAPS患者中免疫细胞亚群的分布，重点关注T-bet+CD11c+ B细胞。此外，旨在利用基于机器学习的聚类分析，通过识别不同的免疫表型并探索其与特定临床表现的关联，来解决pAPS的临床异质性。本研究涉及54名pAPS患者、26名健康对照（HC）和16名健康妊娠（HP）对照。使用流式细胞术分析了16种T细胞和B细胞亚群的分布。应用K-means聚类根据免疫特征对患者进行分层。我们的结果显示，与HC相比，pAPS患者中T-bet+CD11c+ B细胞群体显著增加（中位数3.8% vs. 2.4%，p<0.01）。更重要的是，基于机器学习的探索性聚类分析通过识别三种不同的免疫表型，解决了血栓形成的临床异质性。值得注意的是，以最高T-bet+CD11c+ B细胞水平为特征的Cluster K2（n=17）与静脉血栓形成相关（41.2%）。相比之下，具有不同免疫特征的Cluster K1（n=19）与最高的动脉血栓形成率相关（31.6%）。在血栓事件患者中，还发现T-bet+CD11c+ B细胞水平与致病性抗β2GP1 IgG滴度呈正相关。我们的研究结果表明，pAPS并非单一疾病，而是一种由不同机制定义的免疫表型组成的异质性综合征。我们的分层框架将T细胞驱动和T-bet+CD11c+ B细胞驱动的通路与不同的临床结局联系起来，并为产科APS提供了新的机制见解。

items.title: The expanded cardiovascular risk prediction score as a cardiovascular mortality predictor in rheumatoid arthritis.
items.abstract: We aimed to examine the performance of the expanded cardiovascular (CV) risk prediction score for rheumatoid arthritis (ERS-RA), the Framingham CV risk score and the carotid intima-media thickness (IMT) as predictors of CV mortality in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA). We studied 1194 patients with RA who had an ultrasound measurement of the carotid IMT and who had clinical information to calculate the ERS-RA and the Framingham score. Deaths were confirmed by death certificate and attributed to a CV cause if the immediate or underlying cause of death was due to ICDM-9 codes 390-459. We compared areas under receiver operator characteristic curves (ROC AUC) and examined reclassification tables for the performance of each scale to correctly predict CV deaths. Patients were observed for 10,063 person-years, during which 271 patients died (22.6%), for an overall mortality rate of 2.7 deaths per 100 person-years (95% CI 2.4, 3.0). A CV cause of death was identified in 139 patients (11.6%), for a CV mortality rate of 1.4 per 100 person-years (1.2, 1.6). ROC AUCs were 0.72 (95% CI 0.68, 0.76) for the Framingham scale, 0.76 (95% CI 0.72, 0.81) for the carotid IMT and 0.84 (95% CI 0.81, 0.88) for the ERS-RA. Compared to the Framingham scale the ERS-RA correctly reclassified 6% of patients (p=0.02), while the carotid IMT correctly reclassified 5% (p=0.003). The ERS-RA was superior to the Framingham scale in the prediction of CV mortality in patients with RA.

items.titleZh: 扩展的心血管风险预测评分作为类风湿关节炎心血管死亡预测因子
items.abstractZh: 我们旨在评估扩展的心血管（CV）风险预测评分（ERS-RA）、弗雷明汉心血管风险评分和颈动脉内膜中层厚度（IMT）作为类风湿关节炎（RA）患者心血管死亡预测因子的表现。我们研究了1194例RA患者，这些患者接受了颈动脉IMT超声测量，并有临床信息用于计算ERS-RA和弗雷明汉评分。死亡通过死亡证明确认，如果直接或根本死因是ICDM-9代码390-459，则归因于心血管原因。我们比较了受试者工作特征曲线下面积（ROC AUC），并检查了各量表正确预测心血管死亡的重分类表。患者被观察了10063人年，期间271例患者死亡（22.6%），总死亡率为每100人年2.7例死亡（95% CI 2.4, 3.0）。139例患者（11.6%）被确定死于心血管原因，心血管死亡率为每100人年1.4例（1.2, 1.6）。弗雷明汉量表的ROC AUC为0.72（95% CI 0.68, 0.76），颈动脉IMT为0.76（95% CI 0.72, 0.81），ERS-RA为0.84（95% CI 0.81, 0.88）。与弗雷明汉量表相比，ERS-RA正确重分类了6%的患者（p=0.02），而颈动脉IMT正确重分类了5%（p=0.003）。在RA患者的心血管死亡预测中，ERS-RA优于弗雷明汉量表。

items.title: Comprehensive evaluation of bone structural and microarchitectural changes in rheumatoid arthritis treated with baricitinib using HR-pQCT, imaging, and biomarker analyses.
items.abstract: To comprehensively evaluate the effects of baricitinib on bone structure and bone-related biomarkers in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA) using high-resolution peripheral quantitative computed tomography (HR-pQCT). RA patients initiating baricitinib were enrolled in this prospective study. Bone structure in the second and third metacarpal heads was assessed using HR-pQCT at baseline and after 6 and 12 months. Synovitis, tenosynovitis, and osteitis were evaluated using ultrasound and MRI. Serum cytokines, chemokines, and bone-related biomarkers were analysed through a multiplex bead assay. Fourteen patients with RA who initiated baricitinib were included in the analysis. No new bone erosions were detected during the 12-month period, and several pre-existing erosions showed partial repair. HR-pQCT revealed favourable trends in trabecular bone parameters, including increases in volumetric bone mineral density and trabecular thickness. Serum osteoprotegerin (OPG) significantly increased, while osteopontin (OPN) and interleukin-23 (IL-23) decreased, indicating suppression of the IL-23/Th17/RANKL axis and enhancement of bone preservation pathways. In addition, baricitinib modulated inflammatory mediators, including increased Eotaxin and decreased MCP-3. These changes were accompanied by improvements in synovitis, osteitis, and tenosynovitis assessed by multiple imaging modalities. Baricitinib treatment inhibited the progression of bone erosions and also induced partial repair in some lesions, accompanied by improvements in periarticular bone microarchitecture. These favourable effects on bone structure were paralleled by beneficial modulation of bone-related and inflammatory biomarkers. Collectively, these findings indicate that baricitinib contributes to the prevention of joint destruction primarily through structural preservation, supported by parallel molecular mechanisms.

items.titleZh: 使用HR-pQCT、影像学和生物标志物分析全面评估巴瑞替尼治疗类风湿关节炎的骨骼结构和微结构变化
items.abstractZh: 为了全面评估巴瑞替尼对类风湿关节炎（RA）患者骨骼结构和骨相关生物标志物的影响，采用高分辨率外周定量计算机断层扫描（HR-pQCT）进行研究。这项前瞻性研究纳入了开始使用巴瑞替尼的RA患者。在基线和治疗6个月及12个月时，使用HR-pQCT评估第二和第三掌骨头的骨骼结构。使用超声和MRI评估滑膜炎、腱鞘炎和骨炎。通过多重微珠检测分析血清细胞因子、趋化因子和骨相关生物标志物。分析中纳入了14名开始使用巴瑞替尼的RA患者。在12个月期间未检测到新的骨侵蚀，并且一些已有的侵蚀显示出部分修复。HR-pQCT显示骨小梁参数有有利趋势，包括体积骨密度和骨小梁厚度增加。血清骨保护素（OPG）显著增加，而骨桥蛋白（OPN）和白细胞介素-23（IL-23）降低，表明IL-23/Th17/RANKL轴受到抑制，骨保护通路增强。此外，巴瑞替尼调节了炎症介质，包括嗜酸粒细胞趋化因子增加和MCP-3降低。这些变化伴随着通过多种影像学评估的滑膜炎、骨炎和腱鞘炎的改善。巴瑞替尼治疗抑制了骨侵蚀的进展，并在一些病变中诱导了部分修复，同时改善了关节周围骨微结构。这些对骨骼结构的有利影响伴随着骨相关和炎症生物标志物的有益调节。总体而言，这些发现表明巴瑞替尼主要通过结构保护来预防关节破坏，并得到平行分子机制的支持。

items.title: Fear-avoidance beliefs toward physical activity in axial spondyloarthritis and psoriatic arthritis: insights from a cross-sectional study.
items.abstract: Physical activity is central to spondyloarthritis (SpA) management, yet many patients avoid movement due to fear of pain and negative beliefs about exercise. The relationships between fear-avoidance beliefs, disease activity, pain catastrophising, and quality of life remain unclear. This study aimed to assess the prevalence and determinants of fear-avoidance beliefs related to physical activity in patients with axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA) and psoriatic arthritis (PsA), and to identify associated clinical, demographic, and psychological factors. This monocentric observational study enrolled 159 consecutive patients (70 axSpA, 89 PsA) attending the Rheumatology Unit of Campus Bio-Medico University Hospital. Physical activity avoidance beliefs were assessed with the FABQ-PA (scores ≥15 = high avoidance). Disease activity, quality of life, pain catastrophising, and anxiety/depression were recorded. Group comparisons, Spearman correlations, and uni-/multivariable logistic regression were performed. High physical activity avoidance was observed in 31.4% of the cohort (32.9% axSpA, 30.3% PsA). In axSpA, FABQ-PA ≥15 was associated with higher disease activity, greater PC and poorer SF-36 scores. In multivariable models, BASDAI remained significantly associated with high avoidance, with magnification retaining a weaker independent association, whereas SF-36 and other psychometric variables lost significance. In PsA, FABQ-PA was not associated with BASDAI or DAPSA. High avoidance was independently linked to female sex, higher level of helplessness and rumination, and lower SF-36, PhCS, and MCS scores, even after adjusting for disease activity. Physical activity avoidance in SpA reflects distinct but overlapping pathways. In axSpA, avoidance is predominantly associated with inflammatory disease activity, whereas in PsA it is more closely associated with psychological and quality-of-life-related factors.

items.titleZh: 中轴型脊柱关节炎和银屑病关节炎中对体力活动的恐惧回避信念：一项横断面研究的见解
items.abstractZh: 体力活动是脊柱关节炎（SpA）管理的核心，但许多患者因害怕疼痛和对运动的负面信念而避免活动。恐惧回避信念、疾病活动度、疼痛灾难化和生活质量之间的关系尚不清楚。本研究旨在评估中轴型脊柱关节炎（axSpA）和银屑病关节炎（PsA）患者中与体力活动相关的恐惧回避信念的患病率和决定因素，并确定相关的临床、人口学和心理因素。这项单中心观察性研究纳入了在Campus Bio-Medico大学医院风湿科就诊的159例连续患者（70例axSpA，89例PsA）。使用FABQ-PA评估体力活动回避信念（评分≥15=高度回避）。记录了疾病活动度、生活质量、疼痛灾难化和焦虑/抑郁。进行了组间比较、Spearman相关分析和单/多变量逻辑回归。31.4%的队列观察到高度体力活动回避（axSpA 32.9%，PsA 30.3%）。在axSpA中，FABQ-PA≥15与更高的疾病活动度、更大的PC和更差的SF-36评分相关。在多变量模型中，BASDAI仍与高度回避显著相关，放大维度保持较弱的独立关联，而SF-36和其他心理测量变量失去显著性。在PsA中，FABQ-PA与BASDAI或DAPSA无关。高度回避与女性性别、更高水平的无助感和反刍、以及更低的SF-36、PhCS和MCS评分独立相关，即使在调整疾病活动度后也是如此。SpA中的体力活动回避反映了不同但重叠的途径。在axSpA中，回避主要与炎症性疾病活动度相关，而在PsA中，回避更密切地与心理和生活质量相关因素相关。

items.title: Synovial resident macrophage-derived PU.1 alleviates rheumatoid arthritis by promoting efferocytosis of fibroblast-like synoviocytes.
items.abstract: Spi-1 proto-oncogene (PU.1) is dysregulated in various immune disorders, including rheumatoid arthritis (RA). Herein, we investigate the role of PU.1 in the clearance and degradation of phagolysosomal cargo by synovial resident macrophages in RA. Collagen-induced arthritis (CIA) was used to establish an RA mouse model. Histological analysis was conducted using haematoxylin and eosin (HE) and safranine O/fast green staining. Macrophage function was determined using flow cytometry and propidium iodide staining assay. Moreover, gene expression was analysed by immunofluorescence, immunohistochemistry, western blot, and reverse transcription-quantitative PCR (RT-qPCR). Cytokine release was detected using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA). We found that PU.1 was upregulated in response to RA. PU.1 depletion exacerbated synovial dysfunction, accompanied by the pyroptosis of synovial resident macrophages and the accumulation of dying fibroblast-like synoviocytes (FLS) and inhibition of in vivo efferocytosis. Furthermore, PU.1 deficiency suppressed the formation of LC3-II. Additionally, PU.1 depletion decreased expansion of gelsolin (GSN)+CD86+ cells. Moreover, PU.1 transcriptionally inactivated NLR family pyrin domain containing 3 (NLRP3). Overexpressed PU.1 promoted the proliferation of synovial resident macrophages as well as the clearance of apoptotic FLS in RA. In summary, PU.1-mediated synovial resident macrophage efferocytosis promote tissue repair in RA. Therefore, targeting synovial resident macrophages may a novel strategy for RA.

items.titleZh: 滑膜驻留巨噬细胞来源的PU.1通过促进成纤维样滑膜细胞的胞葬作用缓解类风湿关节炎
items.abstractZh: Spi-1原癌基因（PU.1）在多种免疫疾病中失调，包括类风湿关节炎（RA）。本文研究了PU.1在RA中滑膜驻留巨噬细胞对吞噬溶酶体货物的清除和降解中的作用。采用胶原诱导关节炎（CIA）建立RA小鼠模型。使用苏木精和伊红（HE）及番红O/固绿染色进行组织学分析。通过流式细胞术和碘化丙啶染色测定巨噬细胞功能。此外，通过免疫荧光、免疫组织化学、蛋白质印迹和逆转录定量PCR（RT-qPCR）分析基因表达。使用酶联免疫吸附试验（ELISA）检测细胞因子释放。我们发现PU.1在RA中上调。PU.1缺失加剧了滑膜功能障碍，伴随滑膜驻留巨噬细胞的焦亡和死亡成纤维样滑膜细胞（FLS）的积累以及体内胞葬作用的抑制。此外，PU.1缺陷抑制了LC3-II的形成。另外，PU.1缺失减少了凝溶胶蛋白（GSN）+CD86+细胞的扩增。此外，PU.1转录失活NLR家族含pyrin结构域蛋白3（NLRP3）。过表达PU.1促进了RA中滑膜驻留巨噬细胞的增殖以及凋亡FLS的清除。总之，PU.1介导的滑膜驻留巨噬细胞胞葬作用促进RA中的组织修复。因此，靶向滑膜驻留巨噬细胞可能是RA的一种新策略。

items.title: Common femoral vein wall thickness in antiphospholipid syndrome: a potential imaging biomarker.
items.abstract: Venous wall thickness (VWT) has emerged as a marker of venous disease, and increased VWT as a possible indicator of vascular inflammation. This study included patients aged ≥18 years who fulfilled the 2023 ACR/EULAR Classification Criteria for antiphospholipid syndrome (APS), along with age- and sex-matched healthy controls (HCs) and patients with chronic non-inflammatory deep vein thrombosis (DVT), enrolled between October 2024 and June 2025. Ultrasonographic measurements of bilateral common femoral vein (CFV) posterior wall thickness were performed at separate time points by two experienced radiologists blinded to clinical information, using a broadband linear probe. A total of 55 APS patients, 28 HC, and 21 patients with chronic non-inflammatory DVT were included. The groups were comparable in terms of demographic and clinical characteristics. Among APS patients, 32 had venous thrombosis, 15 arterial thrombosis, 3 both venous and arterial thrombosis, and 5 had obstetric morbidity. Mean right and left CFV wall thicknesses were significantly higher in APS patients (right: 0.535 ± 0.058 mm; left: 0.529 ± 0.065 mm) compared with both chronic DVT patients (right: 0.405 ± 0.066 mm; left: 0.377 ± 0.039 mm) and HCs (right: 0.392 ± 0.043 mm; left: 0.388 ± 0.043 mm) (p<0.001 for both). No significant difference was observed between the chronic DVT and HC groups (p=1.0). Subgroup analysis demonstrated no significant differences in CFV wall thickness between APS patients with and without concomitant SLE. In addition, CFV wall thickness measurements did not differ according to aPL profile or prior venous thrombosis history. Receiver operating characteristic analysis identified optimal VWT cut-off values of 0.443 mm for the right CFV and 0.445 mm for the left CFV, both demonstrating high sensitivity and specificity (AUC >0.94, p<0.001). In patients with uncertain APS diagnosis based on clinical manifestations and/or aPL positivity, measurement of VWT by ultrasonography may serve as a useful adjunctive tool in the diagnostic process.

items.titleZh: 抗磷脂综合征中股总静脉壁厚度：一种潜在的影像学生物标志物
items.abstractZh: 静脉壁厚度（VWT）已成为静脉疾病的标志物，而VWT增加可能是血管炎症的指标。本研究纳入2024年10月至2025年6月期间年龄≥18岁、符合2023年ACR/EULAR抗磷脂综合征（APS）分类标准的患者，以及年龄和性别匹配的健康对照（HCs）和慢性非炎症性深静脉血栓（DVT）患者。由两名对临床信息不知情的经验丰富的放射科医生使用宽带线性探头在不同时间点测量双侧股总静脉（CFV）后壁厚度。共纳入55名APS患者、28名HC和21名慢性非炎症性DVT患者。各组在人口学和临床特征方面具有可比性。APS患者中，32例有静脉血栓，15例有动脉血栓，3例同时有静脉和动脉血栓，5例有产科并发症。APS患者的右和左CFV平均壁厚（右：0.535 ± 0.058 mm；左：0.529 ± 0.065 mm）显著高于慢性DVT患者（右：0.405 ± 0.066 mm；左：0.377 ± 0.039 mm）和HCs（右：0.392 ± 0.043 mm；左：0.388 ± 0.043 mm）（两者p<0.001）。慢性DVT组与HC组之间无显著差异（p=1.0）。亚组分析显示，伴或不伴SLE的APS患者之间CFV壁厚无显著差异。此外，CFV壁厚测量值不因aPL谱或既往静脉血栓史而不同。受试者工作特征分析确定了右CFV的最佳VWT截断值为0.443 mm，左CFV为0.445 mm，两者均显示出高灵敏度和特异度（AUC >0.94，p<0.001）。对于基于临床表现和/或aPL阳性而诊断不确定的APS患者，超声测量VWT可能作为诊断过程中的有用辅助工具。

items.title: Tracking interstitial lung disease in systemic sclerosis: integrating lung magnetic resonance imaging into a clinically oriented multimodal follow-up strategy.
items.abstract: To assess the utility of lung magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) for monitoring interstitial lung disease (ILD) in patients with systemic sclerosis (SSc), using high-resolution CT (HRCT) as the reference. Additionally, we explored associations between MRI sequences and common imaging and functional parameters in SSc-ILD evaluation. SSc patients with ILD requiring treatment initiation or change underwent lung assessment at baseline and after 6 months, including MRI (T2-weighted, T1 post-contrast, and T2 star sequences), HRCT, lung ultrasound, and pulmonary function tests. Six-month MRI and HRCT were qualitatively evaluated for improvement, stability, or progression. A follow-up HRCT was performed 2 years after enrolment. Fourteen SSc-ILD patients (64.3% female, mean age 48.3 years) were enrolled. MRI showed improvement in 1 patient, stability in 9, and progression in 4; in 2 progressed cases, inflammation decreased while fibrotic features increased. T1 contrast sequence significantly correlated with pleural irregularities on ultrasound (ρ=0.55; p=0.04) and DLCO (ρ=-0.65; p=0.01). MRI and HRCT findings at 6 months were concordant in 64.3% of cases, with fair agreement (weighted κ=0.25). MRI outcomes at 6 months matched HRCT findings at 2 years in 92.8% of patients (13/14). Lung MRI is a promising adjunctive tool for monitoring SSc-ILD and may provide complementary information to HRCT on early imaging changes, particularly the transition from inflammation to fibrosis. Among MRI sequences, T1 post-contrast best correlated with functional and ultrasound findings, supporting its role in fibrosis assessment.

items.titleZh: 系统性硬化症中追踪间质性肺病：将肺部磁共振成像整合到以临床为导向的多模式随访策略中
items.abstractZh: 评估肺部磁共振成像（MRI）在监测系统性硬化症（SSc）患者间质性肺病（ILD）中的效用，以高分辨率CT（HRCT）作为参考。此外，我们探讨了MRI序列与SSc-ILD评估中常见影像学和功能参数之间的关联。需要启动或改变治疗的SSc-ILD患者在基线和6个月后接受肺部评估，包括MRI（T2加权、T1增强后和T2星序列）、HRCT、肺部超声和肺功能测试。对6个月的MRI和HRCT进行定性评估，分为改善、稳定或进展。入组后2年进行随访HRCT。共纳入14例SSc-ILD患者（64.3%为女性，平均年龄48.3岁）。MRI显示1例改善，9例稳定，4例进展；在2例进展病例中，炎症减轻而纤维化特征增加。T1增强序列与超声上的胸膜不规则显著相关（ρ=0.55；p=0.04）和DLCO（ρ=-0.65；p=0.01）。6个月时MRI和HRCT结果在64.3%的病例中一致，一致性一般（加权κ=0.25）。6个月时的MRI结果与2年时的HRCT结果在92.8%的患者（13/14）中匹配。肺部MRI是监测SSc-ILD的一种有前景的辅助工具，可能为HRCT提供早期影像学变化的补充信息，特别是从炎症到纤维化的转变。在MRI序列中，T1增强后与功能和超声结果相关性最佳，支持其在纤维化评估中的作用。

items.title: Metagenomic characterization of gut microbiota in rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease: taxonomic shifts and clinical correlations.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease (RA-ILD) is a severe extra-articular manifestation with limited diagnostic biomarkers. While gut microbiota dysbiosis contributes to rheumatoid arthritis (RA) pathogenesis, its specific role in RA-ILD remains poorly characterized. We performed shotgun metagenomic sequencing on fecal samples from 41 participants: 10 RA-ILD patients, 20 RA patients without ILD (RA-non-ILD), and 11 healthy controls (HCs). We assessed alpha and beta diversity, differential abundance (Wilcoxon rank-sum tests with FDR correction), Spearman correlations with clinical parameters, microbial co-occurrence networks, and random forest classification. Alpha and beta diversity did not differ significantly among groups. After FDR correction, no genus differed significantly between RA-ILD and RA-non-ILD. Exploratory analysis (uncorrected P  < 0.05) revealed enrichment of Escherichia/Shigella in RA-ILD (11.72% vs. 2.66%, P  = 0.003) and depletion of Roseburia (1.05% vs. 3.77%, P  = 0.005) and Ruminococcus (5.98% vs. 7.85%, P  = 0.032), while Faecalibacterium showed a trend toward depletion without reaching nominal significance (4.45% vs. 4.66%, P  = 0.409). Correlation analysis revealed a dichotomous pattern: pro-inflammatory genera correlated positively with disease activity, while butyrate-producing genera correlated negatively. Co-occurrence network analysis showed RA patients had a more complex network than HC and RA-ILD. Random forest classification identified Bifidobacterium , unclassified_ Oscillospiraceae, and unclassified_Lachnospiraceae as top discriminators between HC and RA, and unclassified_ Bacteroidaceae, Parabacteroides , and Blautia for RA-ILD vs RA. RA-ILD is associated with specific gut microbial alterations-notably  Escherichia/Shigella enrichment and depletion of Roseburia and Ruminococcus -despite preserved overall diversity. These changes correlate with systemic inflammation and suggest a role for the gut microbiota in RA-ILD pathogenesis via the gut-lung axis. The identified taxa warrant validation as candidate biomarkers in larger cohorts.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病肠道菌群的宏基因组特征：分类学变化与临床相关性
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病（RA-ILD）是一种严重的关节外表现，诊断生物标志物有限。虽然肠道菌群失调参与类风湿关节炎（RA）发病机制，但其在RA-ILD中的具体作用仍不清楚。我们对41名参与者的粪便样本进行了鸟枪法宏基因组测序：10名RA-ILD患者、20名无ILD的RA患者（RA-non-ILD）和11名健康对照（HC）。我们评估了α和β多样性、差异丰度（Wilcoxon秩和检验，FDR校正）、与临床参数的Spearman相关性、微生物共现网络和随机森林分类。各组间α和β多样性无显著差异。经FDR校正后，RA-ILD与RA-non-ILD之间无属水平显著差异。探索性分析（未校正P<0.05）显示，RA-ILD中埃希菌/志贺菌富集（11.72% vs. 2.66%，P=0.003），而罗氏菌（1.05% vs. 3.77%，P=0.005）和瘤胃球菌（5.98% vs. 7.85%，P=0.032）减少，粪杆菌属呈减少趋势但未达到名义显著性（4.45% vs. 4.66%，P=0.409）。相关性分析显示一种二分模式：促炎属与疾病活动度正相关，而产丁酸属负相关。共现网络分析显示，RA患者的网络比HC和RA-ILD更复杂。随机森林分类将双歧杆菌、未分类的颤螺菌科和未分类的毛螺菌科鉴定为HC与RA的最佳区分菌，以及未分类的拟杆菌科、副拟杆菌属和布劳特菌属用于RA-ILD与RA的区分。RA-ILD与特定的肠道微生物改变相关——特别是埃希菌/志贺菌富集以及罗氏菌和瘤胃球菌减少——尽管总体多样性保持不变。这些变化与全身炎症相关，并提示肠道菌群通过肠-肺轴在RA-ILD发病机制中发挥作用。所鉴定的分类群需要在更大队列中作为候选生物标志物进行验证。

items.title: Case report: When Behçet's disease meets multizonal outer retinopathy and retinal pigment epitheliopathy: longitudinal multimodal imaging of an overlap phenotype.
items.abstract: To report a rare case of overlapping features of Behçet's uveitis and multizonal outer retinopathy and retinal pigment epitheliopathy (MORR), documented by longitudinal multimodal imaging. A single case report. A 37-year-old male presented with unilateral, painless, progressive vision loss and a history of recurrent oral ulcers. Multimodal imaging with longitudinal follow-up documented bilateral, progressive outer retinopathy concurrent with retinal vasculitis. These features characterize an acute progressive episode not previously described. This case highlights the importance of multimodal imaging and reminds clinicians to remain vigilant to possible concurrent outer retinopathy in Behçet's uveitis. Furthermore, given the favorable treatment response observed here, this case also offers a reference for the therapeutic strategy of MORR.

items.titleZh: 病例报告：当白塞病遇上多区域外层视网膜病变和视网膜色素上皮病变：重叠表型的纵向多模态成像
items.abstractZh: 报告一例罕见的白塞病葡萄膜炎与多区域外层视网膜病变和视网膜色素上皮病变（MORR）重叠特征的病例，通过纵向多模态成像记录。单病例报告。一名37岁男性出现单侧、无痛、进行性视力丧失，并有复发性口腔溃疡病史。多模态成像及纵向随访记录了双侧、进行性外层视网膜病变并发视网膜血管炎。这些特征描述了一次此前未报道的急性进展性发作。本病例强调了多模态成像的重要性，并提醒临床医生对白塞病葡萄膜炎中可能并存的外层视网膜病变保持警惕。此外，鉴于此处观察到的良好治疗反应，本病例也为MORR的治疗策略提供了参考。

items.title: Japanese evidence on Janus kinase inhibitors for rheumatoid arthritis: a narrative review of risk-optimized use.
items.abstract: Janus kinase inhibitors (JAKi) have expanded treatment options for rheumatoid arthritis (RA) by providing rapid and effective oral therapy. However, their optimal use has become increasingly complex after the emergence of safety concerns involving serious infections, herpes zoster (HZ), major adverse cardiovascular events (MACE), venous thromboembolism (VTE), and malignancy. This issue is particularly relevant in Japan, where the RA population is older and has a higher prevalence of comorbidities. To review the risk-optimized use of JAKi for RA based on Japanese evidence, with particular emphasis on older patients, comorbidity-rich populations, and practical real-world treatment decision-making. We conducted a literature search of PubMed/MEDLINE and Ichushi-Web to identify Japan-specific studies on JAKi in RA. Randomized trials, long-term extension studies, registry analyses, database studies, postmarketing surveillance reports, and observational studies were reviewed. Because of heterogeneity in design, patient background, and outcome definitions, the evidence was synthesized narratively. Japanese evidence indicates that older age is an important but insufficient determinant of JAKi safety. Across studies, treatment outcomes were more strongly influenced by comorbidities, glucocorticoid exposure, laboratory abnormalities, and other patient-related risk factors. HZ emerged as the most consistent safety signal, supporting the importance of vaccination and early monitoring. By contrast, the risk of hospitalized infection was not consistently higher with JAKi than with biologic disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs in older patients, and Japanese evidence on MACE, VTE, and malignancy remained limited or inconsistent. Real-world studies also supported individualized dose optimization, whereas current data did not support routine within-class selection based primarily on JAK selectivity. Current Japanese evidence supports a risk-optimized approach to the use of JAKi in RA. Age alone should not determine treatment decisions. Instead, rheumatologists should individualize JAKi selection, dosing, and monitoring according to comorbidity profile, infection and vascular risk, malignancy background, and therapeutic priorities, particularly in increasingly older and multimorbid patients.

items.titleZh: 日本关于Janus激酶抑制剂治疗类风湿关节炎的证据：风险优化使用的叙述性综述
items.abstractZh: Janus激酶抑制剂（JAKi）通过提供快速有效的口服治疗，扩大了类风湿关节炎（RA）的治疗选择。然而，在出现涉及严重感染、带状疱疹（HZ）、主要不良心血管事件（MACE）、静脉血栓栓塞（VTE）和恶性肿瘤的安全性担忧后，其最佳使用变得越来越复杂。这一问题在日本尤其相关，因为日本RA患者年龄较大且合并症患病率较高。基于日本证据，回顾JAKi在RA中的风险优化使用，特别关注老年患者、合并症丰富的人群以及实际临床治疗决策。我们在PubMed/MEDLINE和Ichushi-Web上进行了文献检索，以识别日本关于RA中JAKi的特定研究。回顾了随机试验、长期扩展研究、注册分析、数据库研究、上市后监测报告和观察性研究。由于研究设计、患者背景和结局定义存在异质性，证据以叙述性方式综合。日本证据表明，年龄是JAKi安全性的重要但非决定性因素。在各项研究中，治疗结局更强烈地受到合并症、糖皮质激素暴露、实验室异常和其他患者相关风险因素的影响。HZ是最一致的安全信号，支持疫苗接种和早期监测的重要性。相比之下，在老年患者中，JAKi的住院感染风险并不一致地高于生物制剂改善病情抗风湿药，而日本关于MACE、VTE和恶性肿瘤的证据仍然有限或不一致。真实世界研究也支持个体化剂量优化，而当前数据不支持主要基于JAK选择性进行常规的同类药物选择。当前的日本证据支持在RA中使用JAKi的风险优化方法。年龄不应单独决定治疗决策。相反，风湿病学家应根据合并症概况、感染和血管风险、恶性肿瘤背景以及治疗优先顺序，个体化选择JAKi、剂量和监测，特别是在日益老龄化和多病共存的患者中。

items.title: Normal serum uric acid gout: a neglected and challenging condition.
items.abstract: During acute gout flares, serum uric acid (SUA) levels may remain within the normal range, making diagnosis based solely on SUA unreliable. A systematic evaluation incorporating clinical symptoms and imaging (ultrasound, dual-source CT) is essential to detect monosodium urate (MSU) crystal deposition. Normal-SUA gout often presents with more pronounced inflammation, fever, elevated white blood cell count and C-reactive protein, and may occur after surgery or hemodialysis. Tophi can appear at typical or atypical sites (e.g., face, neck). No specific treatment guidelines exist, but lowering SUA to <360 μmol/L (6 mg/dl) reduces gout flares and promotes MSU dissolution. Emerging therapies-including anti-IL-1β monoclonal antibodies, NLRP3 inhibitors, uricases, and green tea components-show promise in controlling attacks and dissolving crystals without affecting SUA levels.

items.titleZh: 正常血尿酸痛风：一种被忽视且具有挑战性的疾病。
items.abstractZh: 在急性痛风发作期间，血清尿酸（SUA）水平可能保持在正常范围内，因此仅基于SUA的诊断不可靠。需要结合临床症状和影像学（超声、双源CT）进行系统评估，以检测单钠尿酸盐（MSU）晶体沉积。正常SUA痛风通常表现为更明显的炎症、发热、白细胞计数和C反应蛋白升高，并可能发生在手术或血液透析后。痛风石可出现在典型或非典型部位（如面部、颈部）。目前尚无特定的治疗指南，但将SUA降至<360 μmol/L（6 mg/dl）可减少痛风发作并促进MSU溶解。新兴疗法——包括抗IL-1β单克隆抗体、NLRP3抑制剂、尿酸酶和绿茶成分——在控制发作和溶解晶体方面显示出前景，且不影响SUA水平。

items.title: Immunological profiling of rheumatoid factor-positive primary Sjögren's syndrome by single-cell RNA sequencing.
items.abstract: Primary Sjögren's syndrome (pSS) is a highly heterogeneous autoimmune disease. Previous studies have suggested that rheumatoid factor (RF)-positive patients appear to have a higher incidence of systemic involvement. However, the underlying mechanisms remain unclear. This study aims to elucidate the potential biological mechanisms through single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq). Peripheral blood mononuclear cells from 3 healthy controls, 6 RF-negative (RF - ) pSS patients, and 6 RF-positive (RF + ) pSS patients were subjected to scRNA-seq. Subsequent analyses included pathway enrichment analysis, trajectory analysis, cell-cell communication analysis, and B cell receptor (BCR) and T cell receptor (TCR) repertoire profiling. Potential differences were further validated by flow cytometry. Analysis of B cell subsets revealed a significantly increased proportion of plasma cells in RF + patients, and differential gene expression analysis indicated enhanced pathways related to antibody production, clonal expansion, and type I interferon activation. In T-cell subsets, the RF + group showed a notably higher proportion of CD8 + T cells, which exhibited stronger cytotoxicity and activation of interferon signaling. In contrast, mucosal-associated invariant T (MAIT) cells demonstrated activated interferon signaling but were present at a lower proportion compared to the RF - group. Cell-cell communication analysis revealed strengthened crosstalk between B cells and T cells in the RF + group. Pseudo-time trajectory analysis further indicated that in RF + patients, both plasma cells and CD8 + T cells exhibited a developmental skew toward a terminally differentiated state. Additionally, both BCR and TCR repertoire analyses indicated RF + and RF - patients exhibiting distinct patterns in clonal distribution and frequency. Flow cytometry further validated the increased proportion of CD8 + T cells and the decreased proportion of MAIT cells in the peripheral blood of RF + pSS patients. The RF status in pSS patients is closely associated with specific immune cell profiles. RF + patients exhibit more active plasma cell responses, enhanced CD8 + T-cell cytotoxicity and interferon responses, as well as heightened interferon signaling yet reduced proportion of MAIT cells. RF status serves as a key stratification marker for immune heterogeneity in pSS patients, providing new insights for understanding disease mechanisms and developing targeted therapeutic strategies.

items.titleZh: 通过单细胞RNA测序对类风湿因子阳性原发性干燥综合征的免疫学特征分析
items.abstractZh: 原发性干燥综合征（pSS）是一种高度异质性的自身免疫性疾病。既往研究表明，类风湿因子（RF）阳性患者似乎具有更高的系统性受累发生率。然而，其潜在机制尚不清楚。本研究旨在通过单细胞RNA测序（scRNA-seq）阐明潜在的生物学机制。对3名健康对照、6名RF阴性（RF-）pSS患者和6名RF阳性（RF+）pSS患者的外周血单个核细胞进行scRNA-seq。后续分析包括通路富集分析、轨迹分析、细胞间通讯分析以及B细胞受体（BCR）和T细胞受体（TCR）库分析。通过流式细胞术进一步验证潜在差异。对B细胞亚群的分析显示，RF+患者中浆细胞比例显著增加，差异基因表达分析表明与抗体产生、克隆扩增和I型干扰素激活相关的通路增强。在T细胞亚群中，RF+组显示出显著更高的CD8+ T细胞比例，这些细胞表现出更强的细胞毒性和干扰素信号激活。相比之下，黏膜相关恒定T（MAIT）细胞表现出激活的干扰素信号，但比例低于RF-组。细胞间通讯分析显示RF+组中B细胞和T细胞之间的相互作用增强。伪时间轨迹分析进一步表明，在RF+患者中，浆细胞和CD8+ T细胞均表现出向终末分化状态的发育偏移。此外，BCR和TCR库分析均显示RF+和RF-患者在克隆分布和频率上表现出不同模式。流式细胞术进一步验证了RF+ pSS患者外周血中CD8+ T细胞比例增加和MAIT细胞比例降低。pSS患者的RF状态与特定的免疫细胞特征密切相关。RF+患者表现出更活跃的浆细胞反应、增强的CD8+ T细胞细胞毒性和干扰素反应，以及MAIT细胞干扰素信号增强但比例降低。RF状态是pSS患者免疫异质性的关键分层标志物，为理解疾病机制和制定靶向治疗策略提供了新见解。

items.title: Retrospective Comparative Study of Tacrolimus and Cyclophosphamide Treatment in Pediatric Lupus Nephritis.
items.abstract: Lupus nephritis (LN) is a kidney injury caused by systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) and can lead to serious impairment of renal function. Glucocorticoid (GC) combined with cyclophosphamide (CTX) is currently a commonly used treatment for LN; however, it is associated with several limitations, including a high proportion of refractory cases, a high recurrence rate after remission, and a long treatment cycle. The purpose of this study was to evaluate the safety and efficacy of Tacrolimus (Tac) combined with GC in the treatment of lupus nephritis. This retrospective cohort study included 112 pediatric LN patients at Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region People's Hospital (January 2022 to June 2025), divided into two groups (n = 56 each): Tac group [Tac + GC] and CTX group (CTX + GC), with a treatment duration of 6 months. Primary endpoints included post-treatment overall response rate, pre/post-treatment renal function, and disease activity scores. Secondary endpoints included immune-inflammatory markers, immune function parameters, anti-dsDNA antibody positivity rate (pre/post-treatment), and adverse reaction incidence. Baseline characteristics showed no significant difference between the two groups (P > 0.05). Post-treatment, the Tac group had a significantly higher complete remission rate than the CTX group (P < 0.05). Both groups exhibited improved renal function, reduced immune-inflammatory markers, immunoglobulins, and anti-dsDNA positivity (P < 0.05), and increased complement C3 and C4 levels (P < 0.05). The Tac group showed more pronounced improvements and a lower overall adverse reaction incidence (P < 0.05). Tac combined with GC can improve renal function and immune-inflammatory status in children with lupus nephritis, with good safety.

items.titleZh: 他克莫司与环磷酰胺治疗儿童狼疮性肾炎的回顾性比较研究
items.abstractZh: 狼疮性肾炎（LN）是由系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）引起的肾脏损伤，可导致肾功能严重受损。糖皮质激素（GC）联合环磷酰胺（CTX）是目前LN的常用治疗方法，但存在难治性病例比例高、缓解后复发率高、治疗周期长等局限性。本研究旨在评估他克莫司（Tac）联合GC治疗狼疮性肾炎的安全性和有效性。这项回顾性队列研究纳入内蒙古自治区人民医院112例儿童LN患者（2022年1月至2025年6月），分为两组（每组56例）：Tac组[Tac+GC]和CTX组（CTX+GC），治疗持续6个月。主要终点包括治疗后总缓解率、治疗前后肾功能和疾病活动评分。次要终点包括免疫炎症标志物、免疫功能参数、抗dsDNA抗体阳性率（治疗前后）及不良反应发生率。基线特征显示两组间无显著差异（P>0.05）。治疗后，Tac组完全缓解率显著高于CTX组（P<0.05）。两组肾功能均改善，免疫炎症标志物、免疫球蛋白和抗dsDNA阳性率降低（P<0.05），补体C3和C4水平升高（P<0.05）。Tac组改善更显著，且总不良反应发生率更低（P<0.05）。Tac联合GC可改善儿童狼疮性肾炎的肾功能和免疫炎症状态，安全性良好。

items.title: Nurse-supported self-monitoring of serum urate by gout patients using a treat-to-target approach: a feasibility study.
items.abstract: To assess the feasibility of a nurse-supported, treat-to-target (T2T) self-monitoring approach for gout patients initiating urate-lowering therapy (ULT) using point-of-care testing (POCT) of serum urate (SU) levels. A 24-week prospective feasibility study was conducted at the Sint Maartenskliniek in the Netherlands among 32 patients starting ULT, or recently started ULT and not at target. Participants received a POCT device to self-measure SU levels at home and report results every 4 weeks via a digital platform. Nurses provided education and dosing advice based on SU levels and monitored patient follow-up. Feasibility was assessed using Bowen's framework. Patient data were obtained through questionnaires and chart review, and stakeholder perspectives were collected through semi-structured interviews. Patients found the intervention highly acceptable. Adherence to SU measurements was 93%, with minimal burden and few problems reported. The majority of the patients reached their SU target (75%). Patients had a median of 2 gout flares (interquartile range [IQR] 0-3). Stakeholders valued the intervention for the potential to increase patient engagement and care efficiency, though they emphasized the need for evidence on cost-effectiveness, clear protocols and appropriate patient selection. Nurse-supported self-monitoring for gout was acceptable, feasible and practical in this selected group of gout patients. The short-term SU target attainment was encouraging, warranting larger comparative randomized studies with longer follow-up to establish (cost-) effectiveness, and long-term disease control.

items.titleZh: 护士支持的痛风患者血清尿酸自我监测采用达标治疗策略：一项可行性研究
items.abstractZh: 评估在启动降尿酸治疗（ULT）的痛风患者中，使用即时检测（POCT）血清尿酸（SU）水平进行护士支持的达标治疗（T2T）自我监测方法的可行性。在荷兰Sint Maartenskliniek进行了一项为期24周的前瞻性可行性研究，纳入32名开始ULT或近期开始ULT但未达标的患者。参与者获得一台POCT设备，用于在家中自我测量SU水平，并每4周通过数字平台报告结果。护士根据SU水平提供教育和剂量建议，并监测患者随访。使用Bowen框架评估可行性。通过问卷和病历审查获取患者数据，并通过半结构化访谈收集利益相关者观点。患者认为干预措施高度可接受。SU测量依从性为93%，负担极小且报告问题很少。大多数患者达到SU目标（75%）。患者中位痛风发作次数为2次（四分位距[IQR] 0-3）。利益相关者重视该干预措施在提高患者参与度和护理效率方面的潜力，但强调需要成本效益证据、明确方案和适当的患者选择。在这一特定痛风患者群体中，护士支持的自我监测是可接受、可行且实用的。短期SU目标达成令人鼓舞，值得进行更大规模的比较随机研究，并延长随访以确定（成本）效益和长期疾病控制。

items.title: Diagnostic efficacy of ANAs Combined with serum PTX3 and CCL19 for systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: To investigate the diagnostic efficacy of antinuclear antibody spectrum(ANAs) combined with serum pentraxin 3(PTX3) and chemokine ligand 19(CCL19) for systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE). This is a retrospective study. A total of 80 patients with early atypical SLE who presented to the Department of Rheumatology and Immunology of Affiliated Hospital of Hebei University between January 2022 to June 2025 were retrospectively enrolled as the experimental group. Eighty patients with other autoimmune diseases admitted during the same period were assigned to the disease control group, while 60 gender- and age-matched healthy volunteers from the hospital's Physical Examination Center served as the healthy control group. The Western blot assay was utilized to determine the expression of ANAs in serum, whereas the enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay(ELISA) was adopted for quantifying serum PTX3 and CCL19 levels. In the experimental group, complement C3, complement C4, platelet count, white blood cell count, and hemoglobin levels were significantly lower than those in both the healthy control and disease control groups, while serum creatinine and blood urea nitrogen levels were markedly elevated(all P < 0.05). Serum PTX3 and CCL19 levels in the experimental group were significantly higher than those in the other two groups(all P < 0.05). Compared with the single detection of ANAs, PTX3, or CCL19 alone, the combined detection of these three indicators exhibited significantly higher sensitivity(96.25%), accuracy(90.45%), and negative predictive value(97.60%) (all P < 0.05). ANAs, serum PTX3, and CCL19 can all act as potential diagnostic biomarkers for SLE. The combined detection of these three indicators effectively enhances the diagnostic efficiency of SLE, which is superior to single-marker detection.

items.titleZh: ANAs联合血清PTX3和CCL19对系统性红斑狼疮的诊断效能
items.abstractZh: 探讨抗核抗体谱（ANAs）联合血清正五聚蛋白3（PTX3）和趋化因子配体19（CCL19）对系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）的诊断效能。这是一项回顾性研究。回顾性纳入2022年1月至2025年6月期间就诊于河北大学附属医院风湿免疫科的80例早期非典型SLE患者作为实验组。同期收治的80例其他自身免疫性疾病患者作为疾病对照组，而来自医院体检中心的60名性别和年龄匹配的健康志愿者作为健康对照组。采用Western blot法测定血清中ANAs的表达，采用酶联免疫吸附试验（ELISA）定量检测血清PTX3和CCL19水平。实验组中，补体C3、补体C4、血小板计数、白细胞计数和血红蛋白水平显著低于健康对照组和疾病对照组，而血清肌酐和血尿素氮水平显著升高（均P < 0.05）。实验组血清PTX3和CCL19水平显著高于其他两组（均P < 0.05）。与单独检测ANAs、PTX3或CCL19相比，这三项指标的联合检测显示出显著更高的敏感性（96.25%）、准确性（90.45%）和阴性预测值（97.60%）（均P < 0.05）。ANAs、血清PTX3和CCL19均可作为SLE的潜在诊断生物标志物。这三项指标的联合检测有效提高了SLE的诊断效率，优于单一标志物检测。

items.title: Discordance in bone mineral density between lumbar spine and hip in patients with rheumatoid arthritis: A cross-sectional study.
items.abstract: Osteoporosis is a common comorbidity in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA). In this study, we investigated the discordance in T-scores between the lumbar spine and hip in patients with RA. This cross-sectional study included 520 patients with RA with T-scores for the lumbar spine, total hip, and femoral neck. T-score discordance was defined as differences in the WHO T-score categories between the spine and femur. Major discordance indicated osteoporosis at one site and a normal T-score at the other, whereas minor discordance represented a one-category difference. Discordance was also defined as a ≥1.5 difference in T-scores between the two sites. A comparison of the major, minor, and no discordance groups regarding T-scores of the lumbar spine and hip identified significant variables, including age (P < 0.001), body mass index (P = 0.008), duration of RA (P = 0.001), Health Assessment Questionnaire Disability Index (P < 0.001), pharmacotherapy for osteoporosis (P < 0.001), scoliosis (P = 0.006), and vertebral fracture (P = 0.030). Analysis of the presence or absence of a discordance ≥1.5 in T-scores between the lumbar spine and hip, showed that age (P = 0.010), sex (P < 0.001), duration of RA (P = 0.033), and type 2 diabetes mellitus (P = 0.034) were associated with discordance. This study identified factors associated with discordance in bone mineral density between the lumbar spine and hip in patients with RA, highlighting the need for careful interpretation of site-specific measurements, particularly in high-risk patients.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎患者腰椎与髋部骨密度不一致性：一项横断面研究
items.abstractZh: 骨质疏松是类风湿关节炎（RA）患者的常见合并症。本研究探讨了RA患者腰椎与髋部T评分的不一致性。这项横断面研究纳入了520名RA患者，其腰椎、全髋和股骨颈的T评分均已获得。T评分不一致性定义为脊柱与股骨之间WHO T评分类别的差异。主要不一致性表示一个部位存在骨质疏松而另一个部位T评分正常，而次要不一致性表示一个类别的差异。不一致性也定义为两个部位之间T评分差异≥1.5。比较主要、次要和无不一致性组在腰椎和髋部T评分方面的差异，发现显著变量包括年龄（P<0.001）、体重指数（P=0.008）、RA病程（P=0.001）、健康评估问卷残疾指数（P<0.001）、骨质疏松药物治疗（P<0.001）、脊柱侧弯（P=0.006）和椎体骨折（P=0.030）。分析腰椎与髋部T评分是否存在≥1.5的不一致性，结果显示年龄（P=0.010）、性别（P<0.001）、RA病程（P=0.033）和2型糖尿病（P=0.034）与不一致性相关。本研究确定了RA患者腰椎与髋部骨密度不一致性的相关因素，强调了对特定部位测量结果进行谨慎解读的必要性，尤其是在高风险患者中。

items.title: An Observational Case-Control Study of the Anti-Inflammatory Effects of Bromelain on Peripheral Blood Mononuclear Cells from Patients with Systemic Lupus Erythematosus.
items.abstract: Bromelain is a proteolytic enzyme that has been investigated as an adjuvant for treating autoimmune disorders. However, data regarding the role of bromelain in systemic lupus erythematosus is limited. In the present study, we examined the effect of bromelain on the mononuclear cells of SLE patients, precisely its anti-inflammatory properties. Peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) from SLE patients and healthy controls were stimulated with bromelain (10μg/ml), lipopolysaccharide (10μg/ml), or without any stimulant and cultured for 12 hours. The supernatants were harvested and quantified for IL-1β, TNF-α, IL-6, and IL-17A levels. The mean cytokine levels were compared among different groups using ANOVA and Tukey's post hoc test. Our study revealed that PBMCs of SLE patients (n=41) had significantly higher levels of IL-6 (P=0.0003) and IL-1β (P<0.0001) compared to healthy controls (n=36). When stimulated with lipopolysaccharide, PBMCs of SLE patients showed even higher cytokine levels than healthy controls (IL-6:P<0.0001, TNF-α:P=0.01; IL-1β:P<0.0001). However, the most significant finding was that PBMCs stimulated with bromelain exhibited reduced levels of IL-1β (P<0.0001) and TNF-α (P<0.0001) compared to unstimulated cells of SLE patients. Moreover, cells subjected to lipopolysaccharide and bromelain stimulation displayed lower levels of all cytokines than those stimulated with lipopolysaccharide alone (IL-6:P=0.005, TNF-α:P<0.0001, IL-1β:P<0.0001, IL-17A:P=0.02). The present study highlights the anti-inflammatory role of bromelain in SLE patients by reducing the production of pro-inflammatory cytokine levels in vitro cultured PBMCs derived from SLE patients. Bromelain may be an efficacious adjuvant in managing inflammation in SLE; however, further studies are required.

items.titleZh: 菠萝蛋白酶对系统性红斑狼疮患者外周血单个核细胞抗炎作用的观察性病例对照研究
items.abstractZh: 菠萝蛋白酶是一种蛋白水解酶，已被研究作为治疗自身免疫性疾病的辅助药物。然而，关于菠萝蛋白酶在系统性红斑狼疮中作用的数据有限。在本研究中，我们检测了菠萝蛋白酶对SLE患者单个核细胞的影响，特别是其抗炎特性。将SLE患者和健康对照的外周血单个核细胞用菠萝蛋白酶（10μg/ml）、脂多糖（10μg/ml）或不加任何刺激物刺激，培养12小时。收集上清液并定量检测IL-1β、TNF-α、IL-6和IL-17A水平。使用ANOVA和Tukey事后检验比较不同组间的平均细胞因子水平。我们的研究显示，SLE患者（n=41）的PBMCs中IL-6（P=0.0003）和IL-1β（P<0.0001）水平显著高于健康对照（n=36）。当用脂多糖刺激时，SLE患者的PBMCs显示出比健康对照更高的细胞因子水平（IL-6:P<0.0001，TNF-α:P=0.01；IL-1β:P<0.0001）。然而，最重要的发现是，与未刺激的SLE患者细胞相比，用菠萝蛋白酶刺激的PBMCs显示出降低的IL-1β（P<0.0001）和TNF-α（P<0.0001）水平。此外，同时接受脂多糖和菠萝蛋白酶刺激的细胞显示出比仅用脂多糖刺激的细胞更低的细胞因子水平（IL-6:P=0.005，TNF-α:P<0.0001，IL-1β:P<0.0001，IL-17A:P=0.02）。本研究强调了菠萝蛋白酶在SLE患者中的抗炎作用，通过减少体外培养的SLE患者PBMCs中促炎细胞因子的产生。菠萝蛋白酶可能是管理SLE炎症的有效辅助药物，但仍需进一步研究。

items.title: Serum Sclerostin Correlates with ACPA Positivity in Post-Menopausal Women with Rheumatoid Arthritis: Data from a Cross-Sectional Case-Control Study in Greece.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is a chronic inflammatory disease marked by bone loss, partly due to impaired Wnt signalling. The role of sclerostin, an endogenous Wnt inhibitor, in RA remains unclear. This 9-month cross-sectional case-control study included post-menopausal women recruited at a tertiary hospital in Athens, Greece. Participants underwent clinical assessment, DXA, radiographs, and blood tests. The aim was to assess serum sclerostin levels and their associations in RA. A total of 97 RA patients and 45 controls were included. Mean age was 67 ± 7 years; median RA duration was 8 years; 40% were seropositive; 65% received bDMARDs. Median sclerostin levels did not differ significantly between groups (p=0.645). In RA patients, sclerostin levels were positively associated with ACPA (p=0.043). Notably, 27% of RA patients had extremely high sclerostin levels versus 11% of controls (p=0.035). Within this subgroup, high sclerostin was inversely associated with sarcopenia (p=0.020). Although overall sclerostin levels were similar between groups, higher levels in seropositive RA suggest a possible link with ACPA.

items.titleZh: 血清硬化蛋白与绝经后类风湿关节炎女性ACPA阳性相关：来自希腊一项横断面病例对照研究的数据
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）是一种以骨丢失为特征的慢性炎症性疾病，部分原因是Wnt信号受损。硬化蛋白作为一种内源性Wnt抑制剂，其在RA中的作用尚不清楚。这项为期9个月的横断面病例对照研究纳入了在希腊雅典一家三级医院招募的绝经后女性。参与者接受了临床评估、DXA、X光片和血液检查。目的是评估血清硬化蛋白水平及其在RA中的关联。共纳入97名RA患者和45名对照。平均年龄为67±7岁；RA中位病程为8年；40%为血清阳性；65%接受bDMARDs治疗。中位硬化蛋白水平在组间无显著差异（p=0.645）。在RA患者中，硬化蛋白水平与ACPA呈正相关（p=0.043）。值得注意的是，27%的RA患者具有极高的硬化蛋白水平，而对照组为11%（p=0.035）。在该亚组中，高硬化蛋白与肌少症呈负相关（p=0.020）。尽管总体硬化蛋白水平在组间相似，但血清阳性RA中较高的水平提示其可能与ACPA存在关联。

items.title: Inflammation at the Crossroads: Familial Mediterranean Fever and Cardiovascular Risk.
items.abstract: The understanding between Familial Mediterranean Fever (FMF) and cardiovascular diseases (CVDs) remains unclear. The study's objective was to investigate the association between FMF and CVD. Based on a survey targeting individuals with FMF, the patients diagnosed with coronary artery disease, cerebrovascular disease, and hypertension were considered patients with CVD. Out of 522 patients, 201 had CVD. The mean ± standard deviation (SD) age was 53.00 ± 6.43 in patients without CVD and 57.60 ± 8.33 in patients with CVD. Hypertension was present in 188 patients (36%), coronary artery disease was observed in 51 patients (9.8%), and 10 patients (1.9%) had cerebrovascular disease. In patients with CVD, diabetes (30.3%) was the most common comorbidity. All patients consumed colchicine. Thirty-five patients with (17.2%) and 25 without CVD (7.8%) had colchicine resistance. 90% continued treatment with colchicine. 25 (12.4%) patients with CVD were using biological agents, as were 18 (5.7%) patients without CVD (p=0.006). The attack period average C-reactive protein (CRP) level was 61.3 (SD=53.1), while in remission, it had an average value of 3.39 (SD=4.28). CRP median was 3.00 (3.65) during attacks in the group with CVD, and 2.00 (2.5) in the group without CVD (p=0.011). CRP median was 2.8 (3.55) in patients with hypertension, and 2.00 (2.7) in patients without hypertension. FMF does not appear to increase the risk of CVD. Colchicine resistance was associated with the incidence of cardiovascular diseases. Colchicine and anti-interleukin-1 show promise in reducing the risk of cardiovascular diseases in patients with FMF.

items.titleZh: 炎症的十字路口：家族性地中海热与心血管风险
items.abstractZh: 家族性地中海热（FMF）与心血管疾病（CVD）之间的关系尚不清楚。本研究旨在探讨FMF与CVD之间的关联。基于一项针对FMF患者的调查，被诊断为冠状动脉疾病、脑血管疾病和高血压的患者被视为CVD患者。在522名患者中，201人患有CVD。无CVD患者的平均年龄±标准差（SD）为53.00±6.43岁，有CVD患者为57.60±8.33岁。188名患者（36%）患有高血压，51名患者（9.8%）患有冠状动脉疾病，10名患者（1.9%）患有脑血管疾病。在CVD患者中，糖尿病（30.3%）是最常见的合并症。所有患者均服用秋水仙碱。35名CVD患者（17.2%）和25名非CVD患者（7.8%）存在秋水仙碱耐药。90%的患者继续接受秋水仙碱治疗。25名CVD患者（12.4%）和18名非CVD患者（5.7%）正在使用生物制剂（p=0.006）。发作期平均C反应蛋白（CRP）水平为61.3（SD=53.1），而缓解期平均值为3.39（SD=4.28）。CVD组发作期CRP中位数为3.00（3.65），非CVD组为2.00（2.5）（p=0.011）。高血压患者CRP中位数为2.8（3.55），非高血压患者为2.00（2.7）。FMF似乎不增加CVD风险。秋水仙碱耐药与心血管疾病的发生相关。秋水仙碱和抗白细胞介素-1在降低FMF患者心血管疾病风险方面显示出前景。

items.title: Real-World Effectiveness of Baricitinib in Rheumatoid Arthritis: Significant Reduction of Disease Activity Independent of Age in a Multicentre Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.abstract: To evaluate the real-world effectiveness of baricitinib (BARI) in rheumatoid arthritis (RA), compare outcomes in patients <65 years versus ≥65 years, and identify predictors of DAS28-ESR remission/low disease activity (LDA) at 6 and 12 months. Retrospective multicentre cohort (n=423). Baseline variables included age, sex, disease duration, and comorbidities. DAS28-ESR was recorded at baseline, 6 and 12 months; remission was defined as DAS28-ESR <2.6 and LDA as ≤3.2. Predictors of remission/LDA were assessed with multivariable logistic regression, reporting odds ratios (ORs), 95% confidence intervals (CIs), and p-values. Median age was 60 years (IQR 50.5-69.5); 79% were female; median disease duration 76 months (IQR 31-157). Compared with patients <65, those ≥65 had longer disease duration (94 vs 65 months; p<0.05) and more diabetes (16% vs 5%), dyslipidaemia (47% vs 19%), and hypertension (62% vs 33%) (all p<0.05). Median DAS28-ESR fell from 5.42 (IQR 4.84-6.06) at baseline to 3.71 (2.83-4.59) at 6 months and 3.29 (2.42-4.19) at 12 months (global repeated-measures test significant). Remission+LDA was achieved by 135/421 (32.1%) at 6 months and 182/423 (43.0%) at 12 months; remission alone increased from 65/421 (15.4%) to 117/423 (27.7%). Age ≥65 was not associated with response (6 months: OR 0.71, 95% CI 0.44-1.14, p=0.16; 12 months: OR 0.83, 95% CI 0.55-1.24, p=0.37). ACPA positivity independently predicted remission/LDA (6 months: OR 2.32, 95% CI 1.43-3.77, p<0.05; 12 months: OR 1.71, 95% CI 1.12-2.59, p<0.05). Prior JAK inhibitor exposure was not associated with reduced response. Results were consistent in a per-protocol sensitivity analysis. In this large multicentre real-world cohort, BARI significantly reduced disease activity over 12 months, with comparable effectiveness across age groups. ACPA positivity emerged as an independent predictor of achieving remission/LDA, supporting its potential role in treatment stratification.

items.titleZh: 巴瑞替尼在类风湿关节炎中的真实世界有效性：一项多中心回顾性队列研究中疾病活动度显著降低且不受年龄影响
items.abstractZh: 评估巴瑞替尼（BARI）在类风湿关节炎（RA）中的真实世界有效性，比较<65岁与≥65岁患者的结局，并确定6个月和12个月时DAS28-ESR缓解/低疾病活动度（LDA）的预测因素。回顾性多中心队列（n=423）。基线变量包括年龄、性别、病程和合并症。记录基线、6个月和12个月的DAS28-ESR；缓解定义为DAS28-ESR <2.6，LDA定义为≤3.2。采用多变量逻辑回归评估缓解/LDA的预测因素，报告比值比（OR）、95%置信区间（CI）和p值。中位年龄60岁（IQR 50.5-69.5）；79%为女性；中位病程76个月（IQR 31-157）。与<65岁患者相比，≥65岁患者病程更长（94 vs 65个月；p<0.05），糖尿病（16% vs 5%）、血脂异常（47% vs 19%）和高血压（62% vs 33%）更多（均p<0.05）。中位DAS28-ESR从基线的5.42（IQR 4.84-6.06）降至6个月的3.71（2.83-4.59）和12个月的3.29（2.42-4.19）（全局重复测量检验显著）。6个月时135/421（32.1%）达到缓解+LDA，12个月时182/423（43.0%）；仅缓解率从65/421（15.4%）增至117/423（27.7%）。年龄≥65岁与应答无关（6个月：OR 0.71，95% CI 0.44-1.14，p=0.16；12个月：OR 0.83，95% CI 0.55-1.24，p=0.37）。ACPA阳性独立预测缓解/LDA（6个月：OR 2.32，95% CI 1.43-3.77，p<0.05；12个月：OR 1.71，95% CI 1.12-2.59，p<0.05）。既往JAK抑制剂暴露与应答降低无关。结果在符合方案敏感性分析中一致。在这个大型多中心真实世界队列中，BARI在12个月内显著降低疾病活动度，且各年龄组疗效相当。ACPA阳性成为实现缓解/LDA的独立预测因素，支持其在治疗分层中的潜在作用。

items.title: Retinal Vaso-Occlusive Complications Associated with Systemic Lupus Erythematosus: A Systematic Review of Clinical Presentation and Visual Outcomes.
items.abstract: Ophthalmic involvement in systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE), particularly retinal vascular diseases, remains under-recognised despite its potential to cause severe visual impairment. This systematic review aims to evaluate the clinical presentation, pathophysiology, and treatment outcomes of retinal vascular diseases associated with SLE. A comprehensive literature search was conducted across PubMed/MEDLINE, ScienceDirect, Cochrane and Google Scholar using a combination of relevant MeSH terms. Data were extracted independently and quality assessment was conducted using the Joanna Briggs Institute Critical Appraisal Tool. A total of 35 studies, corresponding to 39 patients, were included in quantitative synthesis. Mean age of patients was 27.8±12.9 years. Most patients were from India (n=10; 25%) and the USA (n=8; 20%), with a majority being female (n=31; 79.5%). Unilateral visual disturbances were reported in 25 (64%) cases while 14 (36%) patients showed bilateral symptoms. Disease was sudden in onset in 23 (59%) and followed a progressive course in 16 (41%) patients. Common findings included Central Retinal Artery Occlusion (CRAO) n 24 patients (61.5%) and Central Retinal Vein Occlusion (CRVO) in 22 patients (56.4%). 36 patients (92%) were treated with steroids but only 25% responded positively, necessitating the use of immunosuppressants in 24 (61.5%) and anticoagulants in 16 (41%) patients. Among the 38 patients where outcomes were reported, only 2 (5%) achieved complete recovery, 14 (37%) showed partial recovery, and 20 (52.6%) showed no improvement. Retinal vascular involvement in SLE is rare but associated with significant visual morbidity. Early diagnosis and combined immunosuppressive therapy may improve outcomes. Further research is required to stan-dardise treatment protocols.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮相关视网膜血管闭塞性并发症：临床表现与视力结局的系统评价
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）的眼部受累，特别是视网膜血管疾病，尽管可能导致严重视力损害，但仍未得到充分认识。本系统评价旨在评估SLE相关视网膜血管疾病的临床表现、病理生理学及治疗结局。在PubMed/MEDLINE、ScienceDirect、Cochrane和Google Scholar中，使用相关MeSH术语组合进行了全面的文献检索。独立提取数据，并使用乔安娜·布里格斯研究所关键评估工具进行质量评估。定量综合共纳入35项研究，对应39例患者。患者平均年龄为27.8±12.9岁。大多数患者来自印度（n=10；25%）和美国（USA）（n=8；20%），其中女性占多数（n=31；79.5%）。25例（64%）报告单侧视力障碍，14例（36%）患者表现为双侧症状。23例（59%）疾病突然发作，16例（41%）患者呈进行性病程。常见表现包括24例（61.5%）患者的视网膜中央动脉阻塞（CRAO）和22例（56.4%）患者的视网膜中央静脉阻塞（CRVO）。36例（92%）患者接受类固醇治疗，但仅25%反应良好，因此24例（61.5%）需要使用免疫抑制剂，16例（41%）需要使用抗凝剂。在报告结局的38例患者中，仅2例（5%）完全恢复，14例（37%）部分恢复，20例（52.6%）无改善。SLE的视网膜血管受累罕见，但与显著的视力病残相关。早期诊断和联合免疫抑制治疗可能改善结局。需要进一步研究以标准化治疗方案。

items.title: Phenotypic Heterogeneity in Familial Takayasu Arteritis Across Two Families: A Case-Based Review.
items.abstract: Takayasu arteritis (TAK) is a rare large-vessel vasculitis that predominantly affects young women. Familial cases are uncommon but suggest a possible genetic predisposition. We describe five familial TAK cases from two families. In the first, two sisters had distinct disease patterns: one with severe supra-aortic involvement (Hata IIa), requiring intensive immunosuppression and vascular interventions; the other with isolated abdominal aortic disease (Hata IV), successfully managed with standard therapy. In the second family, three siblings presented with varying severity. One sister had mild disease responsive to therapy, whereas another developed rapidly progressive TAK with multivessel involvement, necessitating complex surgical management and ultimately succumbing to COVID-19 complications. Their brother presented with extensive Hata V involvement and achieved remission following brief medical therapy. Familial TAK demonstrates marked clinical and radiological heterogeneity, even among first-degree relatives. These findings underscore the importance of clinical vigilance and prompt evaluation for relatives who develop suggestive symptoms, to enable timely diagnosis and improve clinical outcomes.
